completed_tasks.name: Web Server Cookie Management and Session Integration

blockers.description: Login authentication is failing (redirects back to login page with 401 Unauthorized for status/config APIs) when using JWT/HMAC token implementation.
blockers.workaround: Working copy of session.c has been temporarily reverted/rewritten to use in-memory slot-based session token storage to isolate/bypass unreliable mbedtls setup producing stack junk signature mismatches.

human_actions_pending.action: Flash the new slot-based session storage firmware to the device (COM5) and re-test login / redirect behavior.
human_actions_pending.context: To verify if the slot-based session storage bypasses the login issue.

decisions.decision: Temporarily rewrite session.c in working copy to use stateful in-memory slot-based session token store instead of stateless JWT.
decisions.rationale: Unreliable mbedtls setup on ESP-IDF was producing signature mismatches (uninitialized memory stack junk), blocking the login flow.

next_action: Flash the slot-based session storage firmware to COM5 and run UAT Test 1 again to verify redirection.
context_notes: We are pausing in the middle of Phase 01 UAT. The JWT implementation has signature verification issues because mbedtls_md_setup was failing/returning stack junk. We have written a slot-based session store in the working copy. We need to flash this and see if it fixes the user's login blocker.
